# robots.txt Template
# Generated by AMS2 seo-technical-optimization skill
#
# IMPORTANT: This file controls which crawlers can access your site.
# Test at: https://search.google.com/search-console/robots-testing-tool
#
# Place this file at the root: https://www.example.com/robots.txt

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# ALLOW: Main search engines (never block these)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profil/
Disallow: /hesabim/

User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
# Yandex is important for Turkey — keep this enabled

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# ALLOW: SEO & analytics tools (optional)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Allow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Allow: /

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# AI SCRAPERS — Ethical decision required
#
# Blocking AI scrapers prevents your content
# from being used in LLM training datasets.
# This is your choice — uncomment to block.
#
# Pros of blocking:
# - Reduces server load
# - Prevents content use in AI training without consent
# - Matches your terms of service
#
# Cons of blocking:
# - AI tools won't cite/recommend your site
# - May affect discoverability via AI assistants
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

# User-agent: GPTBot
# Disallow: /

# User-agent: ChatGPT-User
# Disallow: /

# User-agent: CCBot
# Disallow: /

# User-agent: Claude-Web
# Disallow: /

# User-agent: anthropic-ai
# Disallow: /

# User-agent: Google-Extended
# Disallow: /

# User-agent: cohere-ai
# Disallow: /

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# BLOCK: Low-quality / spam crawlers
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# DEFAULT: All other crawlers
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /profil/
Disallow: /hesabim/
Disallow: /arama?
Disallow: /*?*sort=
Disallow: /*?*page=
# Note: Don't disallow CSS/JS — Google needs them for rendering

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Sitemap location(s)
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

Sitemap: https://www.example.com/sitemap.xml

# For multiple sitemaps:
# Sitemap: https://www.example.com/sitemap-pages.xml
# Sitemap: https://www.example.com/sitemap-jobs.xml

# ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Crawl-delay (optional — only for overloaded servers)
# Google ignores this; Yandex and Bing respect it
# ──────────────────────────────────────────────

# User-agent: *
# Crawl-delay: 10
